summary: This internal document outlines brainstormed distribution and engagement strategies for KeepMeCompany, focusing on family involvement and senior loneliness. It details both standard marketing tactics and highly experimental concepts, including creating AI avatars of deceased seniors for their families. The ideas are categorized by boldness and scalability, with some noted as non-scalable.
